title: Satellite view of Glacier Bay National Park
description: Overhead satellite view of the Glacier Bay fjord system showing snow-covered mountains and turquoise glacial meltwater fjords. Visually consistent with NASA Landsat imagery of the park.
alt: Aerial satellite view of Glacier Bay showing snow-covered mountains and turquoise glacial meltwater fjords
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — file visually confirmed as satellite imagery of Glacier Bay National Park; matching the Landsat NASA Earth Observatory collection for Alaska's Glacier Bay
